caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is positioned against a plain dark background. She wears a light green, embroidered tunic and a dark beaded necklace. Throughout the sequence, she is speaking and gesturing with her hands to emphasize her points. In the beginning, her right hand is slightly raised, but as the sequence progresses, she moves her hands more actively, bringing them together in front of her chest. A small circular logo featuring a sun-like symbol and the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene. The woman remains the central focus, with the lighting and setting remaining constant while only her facial expressions and hand movements change as she continues her presentation.
